description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with buttoned flaps at the hems, round neck and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Dress your little one in this white T-shirt from ant the next time you go together on an evening walk.
